# McpClient.DiscoverAsync method

Performs `server/discover` (spec §5.3), caches the server's identity and capabilities, and selects the highest mutually supported revision for subsequent requests (§5.4).

```csharp
public Task<DiscoverResult> DiscoverAsync()
```

## Return Value

The discovery result.
